name: mp-election-survey
description: MP State Election Commission – Polling Booth Survey micro-app (Angular 18, loaded inside Flutter via InAppWebView).

scripts.build:mpsec: ng build --configuration mpsec --base-href /pssurvey/ && npm run postbuild:iis
scripts.build:staging: ng build --configuration staging --base-href /pssurvey/ && npm run postbuild:iis
scripts.build:pages: ng build --configuration pages --base-href /evm_management_system/ && npm run postbuild:iis
scripts.test: npm run test:logic && npm run test:api
